data.title: World Liberty to involve community in WLFI unlock vote after holder criticism; proposes phased vesting plan.
data.description: World Liberty has announced its proposal to unlock WLFI tokens, which will undergo community feedback before a formal vote. The plan includes a phased vesting approach instead of an immediate token release. The community will have the opportunity to provide input on this proposal before a final decision is made.
The number of victims of the explosion in Vladikavkaz, Russia has risen to two, according to the head of the region

data.title: PCSI Completes Acquisition of CareStarter and Feedback, Launching PCSIx Innovation Unit
data.description: In Austin, Texas, Professional Contract Services, Inc. (PCSI), a renowned national nonprofit empowering individuals with disabilities, has revealed its acquisition of CareStarter and Feedback. These two tech companies now under the umbrella of PCSI are instrumental in establishing PCSIx, the organization's innovative unit. Known as "Pick Six," this new initiative signifies PCSI's dedication to improving the well-being of individuals with disabilities by providing employment opportunities and advocacy. This strategic move highlights PCSI's commitment to advancing its mission, with the goal of positively impacting the lives of those with disabilities.

data.title: EX.IO Partners with Payment Asia, Joining Hands to Support Hong Kong's Licensed Stablecoin Ecosystem
data.description: In Hong Kong on April 10, 2026, EX.IO, a prominent licensed digital asset trading platform, revealed the signing of a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) with Payment Asia, a comprehensive electronic payment platform. The collaborative effort aims to delve into and enhance payment and custody services.

data.title: Wrap Lands Major Pre-Order for Over 20 Drone and Counter-Drone Systems, Advancing Expansion Across the U.K. and Europe
data.description: The recent purchase indicates a rising demand for counter-unmanned aircraft system (C-UAS) capabilities internationally, with public safety agencies increasingly seeking non-lethal solutions to address modern threats. This points to a significant market opportunity as the need for such technologies continues to grow.

data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin Trade Flat Despite Over $400M In ETF Inflows
data.description: Bitcoin is currently trading at around $72,000, with Bitcoin ETFs experiencing $343.3 million in net inflows on Thursday. Additionally, Ethereum ETFs recorded $85.2 million in net inflows. The latest cryptocurrency ticker prices are as follows: Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) at $71,913.67, Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) at $2,197.31, Solana (CRYPTO: SOL) at $83.39, XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) at $1.33, Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) at $0.09227, and Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) at $0.055886. The meme coin market capitalization has increased by 0.5% to $34 billion within the past 24 hours. Notably, crypto chart analyst Ali shared their insights on the current market trends. For more details, the full story can be accessed on the Benzinga website.

data.title: SOLOWIN HOLDINGS Announces Participation in Libeara’s Funding Round to Accelerate Growth of the Tokenization Ecosystem
data.description: In Hong Kong on April 10, 2026, Solowin Holdings (Nasdaq: AXG) revealed that its venture arm, AlloyX Ventures Limited, has taken part in the latest funding round for Libeara Pte. Ltd., a regulated real-world asset tokenization platform. This move is aimed at enhancing ecosystem synergies and progressing tokenization efforts in Asia and worldwide. The partnership between AlloyX Limited, a subsidiary of AXG, and Libeara resulted in the launch of RYT, a tokenized money market fund created using AXG’s AI-driven tokenization service platform, FERION.

data.title: Viking Therapeutics to Participate at Upcoming Investor Conferences
data.description: On April 10, 2026, Viking Therapeutics, Inc. ("Viking") disclosed its plans to participate in various forthcoming events. Viking, a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical firm traded on NASDAQ under the symbol VKTX, specializes in creating innovative treatments for metabolic and endocrine conditions. This announcement signifies the company's proactive engagement in the field.

data.title: Leeds Equity Partners Closes Latest Private Equity Fund at $1.9 Billion, Surpassing its Fund Target
data.description: Leeds Equity Partners, a private equity firm, recently declared the completion of fundraising for Leeds Equity Partners VIII, L.P. ("Leeds VIII"), along with its parallel investment entities. The fund secured around $1.9 billion in total commitments.
